creator: @zoeroseziegler
transcript: Watch me order 60 grams worth of protein under 500 calories from Denny's. Can I build my own Grand Slam? Can I do two egg whites? Two of the turkey bacon strips? Can I get an English muffin? Is there any way that I could just do like a grilled chicken breast? Perfect. Extra protein.
caption:
Weight loss order from Denny's!! 60 g protein, under 500 cals

@dennysdiner #food #foodie #foodporn #diet #weightloss #weightlossjourney #dennys
ocr_summary: ORDER 60 GRAMS PROTEIN UNDER 500 CALORIES FROM DENNY'S; CAN BUILD MY OWN GRAND SLAM?; TWO EGG WHITES; THE TURKEY BACON STRIPS; AN ENGLISH MUFFIN; LIKE A GRILLED (chicken breast)
visual_scenes: Woman at Denny's diner booth ordering food, talking head with bold text overlays showing each word of her order. Shows the ordering process live at the restaurant.

swaps.swap_meal: Build Your Own Grand Slam (Lean Version)
swaps.swap_method: Build Your Own Grand Slam - swap regular items for egg whites, turkey bacon, English muffin, and add grilled chicken breast
